title: Smoky Seaweed Stir-fry
description: A quick and tasty vegan Japanese dish featuring smoky flavors from seaweed, white sauerkraut, and a vibrant, crispy texture.

ingredients.name: 1 cup dried seaweed
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for at least 4 hours before using

instructions: Soak the seaweed in water for at least 4 hours. Drain and rinse under cold water.
In a wok or large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sliced onion to the pan; sauté until fragrant and slightly golden.
Stir in the white sauerkraut paste, mixing well with vegetables to create a smooth sauce.
Pour in the soy sauce and smoked paprika. Stir frequently for about 1 minute until it thickens slightly.
Add the soaked and drained seaweed to the wok or skillet. Cook on high heat for 2-3 minutes until crispy.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then serve hot.
